title: 5. Lab: Building a collaborative document drafting team

blocks.content: Lab: Building a Collaborative Document Drafting Team
In this lab, you will build a Python program that defines a sequential pipeline. You will run a Writer Agent that produces text and a Reviewer Agent that flags missing details.

Question 1: What detail was reported as missing by the Reviewer Agent?
- A) ADK installation steps
- B) Details about sandboxed execution
- C) Code indentation rules

Feedback: Option B is correct. The text draft did not contain the word 'sandbox'.
